tool_spec.name: resolve_cim_comparison
tool_spec.description: Resolve a supported CIM comparison intent into required SV metric and base attributes

classification.reasoning: The request asks for time points when a specific transformer (Transformator 19/20) reached maximum and minimum loading (Auslastung) on a given date. This requires comparing the state value (SV) of loading against the transformer's rated capacity (base value) to identify extrema, fitting standard_comparison. The asset is explicitly named, date is specified, and no missing context is present. Future date (09.01.26) is not a rejection reason per critical rules.
